chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-6317 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTION. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 17233/2025. 2) For orders on Misc. No. 17234/2025. 25.08.2025. M/s. Nadeem Ahmed & Muhammad Rizwan, Advocates for Petitioner. ________________ 1) Granted. 2) This is an application for withdrawal of this Petition duly supported by the affidavit of the Petitioner. Accordingly, the same is allowed. Petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
